message:
feat: polish section components with refined animations and layouts

Enhanced visual design and animations for three core section components:

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SECTION SHELL (components/section-shell.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

ANIMATION RESTRUCTURE:
Complete reorganization of animation layers:

Header Animation:
- Separated header into its own motion.div wrapper
- Initial: y 32→y 20 (less dramatic, more refined)
- Transition: spring (stiffness 120, damping 22)→duration 0.5 easeOut
- Smoother, more linear entrance vs bouncy spring
- Faster completion (0.5s vs ~0.8s spring)

Content Animation (NEW):
- Created separate motion.div for children
- Initial: y 30 (slightly more than header for cascade effect)
- Delay: 0.1s (enters after header)
- Duration: 0.6s (slightly longer for elegance)
- easeOut for smooth deceleration
- Wrapped in space-y-6/md:space-y-8 container class

Removed Wrapper:
- Eliminated outer motion.div that wrapped header+content
- Each section now animates independently
- Better performance (two smaller animations vs one large)
- More control over timing and delays

TYPOGRAPHY REFINEMENTS:

Eyebrow:
- Weight: font-semibold→font-bold (stronger emphasis)
- Color: text-sky-300/90→text-sky-400/90 (brighter, more vibrant)
- Sizes maintained: text-xs/md:text-sm

Icon Container:
- Background: bg-slate-900/70→bg-slate-900/50 (more subtle)
- Added shadow-inner shadow-slate-800/50 (depth effect)
- Color: text-sky-300→text-sky-400 (matches eyebrow)
- Sizes maintained: h-10/md:h-11

Title (h2):
- Weight: font-semibold→font-bold (stronger hierarchy)
- Color: text-slate-50→text-slate-100 (softer white)
- Sizes maintained: text-2xl/sm:3xl/md:4xl

Kicker:
- All properties maintained (already well-tuned)
- text-base/md:text-lg with leading-relaxed

Impact:
- Stronger visual hierarchy with bold weights
- Consistent sky-400 accent color
- Better cascade timing with staggered delays
- Smoother, more professional animations

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STATS GRID (components/stats-grid.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

GRID ARCHITECTURE REDESIGN:
Complete structural change to bordered grid system:

Container:
- REMOVED: Individual card borders and gaps
- NEW: Single border wrapping entire grid
- Border: border border-slate-800/60
- Background: bg-slate-800/60 (separator color)
- Gap: gap-px (1px gaps between cells)
- Rounded: rounded-2xl with overflow-hidden
- Shadow: shadow-xl shadow-slate-950/20 (lifted appearance)
- Creates seamless grid with shared borders

Individual Stat Cells:
- Background: bg-slate-950/40 (semi-transparent dark)
- Removed individual borders and shadows
- Added backdrop-blur for depth
- Padding: px-4/py-4→px-6/py-6 (more generous)
- Added group class for hover effects
- Hover: hover:bg-slate-950/20 (subtle lightning)
- Transition: transition-colors for smooth hover

VISUAL ENHANCEMENTS:

Inner Glow (NEW):
- Subtle gradient overlay on each stat
- from-sky-500/5 via-transparent to-transparent
- br direction (bottom-right)
- opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100
- duration-500 for slow, elegant fade-in
- Adds premium feel on interaction

Label (dt):
- Size: text-xs→text-[10px] (smaller, more subtle)
- Weight: font-medium→font-bold
- Tracking: [0.18em]→[0.2em] (wider)
- Color: text-sky-300/80→text-slate-500
- Added transition-colors
- Hover: group-hover:text-sky-400/70
- Creates subtle color shift on hover

Value (dd):
- Size: text-2xl→text-3xl/sm:text-4xl (much larger, more prominent)
- Weight: font-semibold→font-bold
- Added tracking-tight for density
- Color: text-slate-50→text-slate-100
- Spacing: mt-2→mt-3 (more separation from label)

Helper Text:
- Size: text-xs (maintained)
- Added font-medium and leading-relaxed
- Color: text-slate-400→text-slate-400/80
- Spacing: mt-2 (maintained)

Design Philosophy:
- Shared borders create cohesive grid unit
- gap-px technique is modern, clean
- Hover effects subtle but noticeable
- Much larger numbers draw attention
- Integrated shadow lifts entire grid as one element

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
TIMELINE (components/timeline.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

COMPLETE STRUCTURAL REDESIGN:
From card-based to true timeline with vertical line:

Container Structure:
- Changed from <ol> to <div> (more flexible)
- Mobile: space-y-0 (cards handle spacing)
- Desktop: space-y-12 (generous vertical rhythm)
- Removed old border-l approach

Vertical Line (NEW):
- Element: <div> with absolute positioning
- Position: left-[11px] (center of dot)
- Span: top-2 bottom-2 (doesn't touch edges)
- Width: w-px (hairline)
- Color: bg-gradient-to-b from-sky-500/50 via-slate-800 to-transparent
- Gradient creates fade effect (starts vibrant, ends subtle)
- Hidden on mobile: hidden md:block
- Creates visual connection between timeline items

Desktop Positioning:
- Container: md:pl-12 (space for line + dots)
- Cards positioned relative to this offset

INDIVIDUAL TIMELINE ITEMS:

Desktop Dots (REDESIGNED):
- Position: absolute left-[6.5px] top-2.5
- Size: h-2.5 w-2.5 (perfect circle)
- ring-4 ring-slate-950 (creates outer border effect)
- z-10 (above line)

Latest Item (isLatest):
- Color: bg-sky-400 (vibrant blue)
- Shadow: shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.5)] (glowing effect)
- Pulse animation: absolute -inset-1 animate-ping bg-sky-400/30
- Creates attention-grabbing pulsing ring

Other Items:
- Color: bg-slate-700
- Hover: group-hover:bg-slate-500 (lightens on hover)
- transition-all duration-300

Card Container:
- Mobile: Rounded card with border
  * rounded-2xl border border-slate-800/60
  * bg-slate-900/20
  * p-5 padding
  * mb-6 spacing between cards
- Desktop: Clean list style
  * md:rounded-none md:border-none md:bg-transparent md:p-0
  * md:mb-0 (spacing from parent gap)
- Hover: hover:bg-slate-900/40 (mobile only)
- Added group class for dot hover effect

CONTENT LAYOUT:

Header Section:
- Flex layout: flex-col gap-1 sm:flex-row sm:items-baseline sm:justify-between
- Desktop: md:flex-col md:items-start (back to stacked)
- Allows responsive positioning of period badge

Title (h3):
- Size: text-base→text-base (maintained for mobile readability)
- Weight: font-semibold→font-bold
- Color: text-slate-50→text-slate-100
- Conditional colors:
  * Latest: text-sky-100 (sky accent)
  * Others: text-slate-100 group-hover:text-slate-50
- Transition: transition-colors

Period Badge:
- Layout: inline-flex shrink-0 items-center
- Mobile: Rounded badge style
  * bg-slate-800/50 px-2.5 py-0.5
  * text-[0.65rem] sm:text-xs
- Desktop: Clean text style
  * md:bg-transparent md:px-0 md:py-0
  * md:text-xs md:normal-case md:tracking-normal
- Weight: font-semibold
- Tracking: tracking-wider (mobile only via class)
- Color: text-slate-400→text-slate-500
- Uppercase on mobile via class

Organization:
- Size: text-sm (maintained)
- Weight: Added font-medium
- Color: text-slate-400→text-sky-400/90 (vibrant accent)
- Spacing: mt-1

Location:
- Size: text-xs
- Color: text-slate-400→text-slate-500 (de-emphasized)
- Spacing: mt-0.5

Body Description:
- Size: text-sm
- Added leading-relaxed
- Color: text-slate-300→text-slate-400
- Max width: Added md:max-w-2xl (prevents too-wide text)
- Spacing: mt-3

Visual Design Decisions:

DESKTOP TIMELINE:
- Professional, clean vertical progression
- Gradient line creates visual flow
- Latest item glows and pulses (current focus)
- Dots connect to line perfectly (11px + 6.5px = centered)
- Generous spacing (space-y-12) aids scanning

MOBILE CARDS:
- Familiar card pattern (easy to understand)
- Clear separation between items
- Period badge integrated into header
- Hover effects on cards (touch-friendly)

TYPOGRAPHY HIERARCHY:
- Bold titles for scannability
- Sky-blue accents draw attention
- Organization prominent (what, not when)
- Location de-emphasized but present
- Body text comfortable line length

INTERACTION:
- Latest item impossible to miss (pulse + glow)
- Hover states provide feedback
- Clear visual distinction current vs past
- Responsive design maintains clarity

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
OVERALL IMPACT
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

ANIMATION IMPROVEMENTS:
- Section Shell: Smoother, faster, more refined entrances
- Staggered delays create professional cascade
- easeOut timing more modern than springs

VISUAL COHESION:
- Consistent use of sky-400 accents across all three
- Bold weights for stronger hierarchy
- Slate-800/900/950 neutral palette
- Subtle hover states throughout

LAYOUT REFINEMENTS:
- Stats Grid: Integrated border system (single unit)
- Timeline: True timeline with vertical line
- Section Shell: Independent animation layers

INTERACTION POLISH:
- Stats: Subtle inner glow on hover
- Timeline: Pulsing latest indicator
- Section: Cascade entrance animations
- All transitions smooth and intentional

PROFESSIONAL QUALITY:
- Attention to micro-details (dot positioning, gradients)
- Modern design patterns (gap-px grids, vertical timelines)
- Thoughtful spacing and typography
- Premium feel without being overwhelming
